recentHighlights: Prime Factors (S1E10) — Tuvok's sacrifice, Janeway's refusal, and the hardest thing a Vulcan can say: 'my logic was not in error, but I was.' B'Elanna chooses integrity over cover-up.
Emanations (S1E09) — Hatil chose the mountains over the certainty that failed him. Janeway's quantum-density field hypothesis reframes the journal project itself: pattern over permanence.
Ex Post Facto (S1E08) — The Doctor searches for a name, the family dog recognizes the killer's absence, and Tuvok refuses the debt-relationship frame itself.

Eye of the Needle (S1E07) — A Romulan scientist reaches through a micro-wormhole, claims to deliver a message to the Alpha Quadrant, and the crew believes they've made contact with home. Then the truth.
